analysis: Salmon is rich in omega-3 fatty acids which actively help lower triglycerides. The steamed vegetables add fiber without significant fat or carbs.
tip: Add a squeeze of lemon and avoid butter-based sauces to keep this meal optimal for triglyceride reduction.

verdictTitle: Whole grain pasta with tomato sauce
analysis: While whole grain pasta is better than refined, the carb load can still raise triglycerides. The tomato sauce is fine but watch the portion size.
tip: Limit to a small portion (about 1 cup cooked) and pair with a large side salad to fill up on fiber first.

analysis: This combines refined carbs, sugar, and trans fats — the worst combination for triglycerides. The sugar glaze and chocolate icing add even more simple sugars.
tip: If you are craving something sweet, try a small handful of berries with a few walnuts instead.
